name: booking
description: Gosselin Booking Desk — rentals & course bookings app: Shopify-native storefront widget, staff store view pushing to LS Retail POS, NAV LS Activity integration.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web,mobile -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.build: vite build web && vite build mobile && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p web/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p mobile/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.serve: vite build web && vite build mobile && NODE_ENV=production tsx server/index.ts
